_publications._publicationTitle: Pharmacogenomic Synthetic Lethal Screens Reveal Hidden Vulnerabilities and New Therapeutic Approaches for Treatment of NF1-Associated Tumors.

_contextSnippet: The NF1-deficient cell lines exhibit similar growth dynamics to their NF1-proficient sister clones (Supplementary Fig. S3) over a short-term in vitro growth assay. The NF1-deficient clones N0(5) and N0(32) showed a slight trend toward faster growth over the course of a 3-day assay, but this did not reach statistical significance.
details: NF1-deficient and NF1-proficient iHSCs exhibit similar growth dynamics over short-term in vitro growth assay, with NF1-deficient clones showing slight trend toward faster growth over 3-day assay but not statistically significant
